description: §65.2.4 — two component-scope `#{}` rules on the SAME tag (`button {}` twice) that unconditionally set the same property (`color`) provably match the same element (an element has exactly one tag name → same tag = shared) → E-STYLE-CONFLICT (hard, error). The `tag × tag` decidable shape.
rationale: §65.2.4 decidable core: `tag × tag` (same tag → provably shared; different tag → provably disjoint). Two `button` rules setting `color` unconditionally, at the same precedence level, is a proven same-property overlap → hard E-STYLE-CONFLICT. No soft diagnostic on a proven overlap.
